---
title: "NeuralGraph.tsx"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\NeuralGraph.tsx"
loc: 177
complexity: 12
logic_score: 5.45
style_score: 3.80
intel_score: 3.81
overall_score: 2.32
---

## Intent
The `NeuralGraph.tsx` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on NeuralGraph, NeuralGraph, useThree, simReady, useMatrixStore, useNeuralData, odinTexture, alfredTexture, simulation, i, map, protocol, ws, msg, targetNode, handleNodeClick, targetPos, activeNodeId. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via NeuralGraph, NeuralGraph, useThree, simReady, useMatrixStore, useNeuralData, odinTexture, alfredTexture, simulation, i, map, protocol, ws, msg, targetNode, handleNodeClick, targetPos, activeNodeId. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 137 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useMemo](file://react)
- [useRef](file://react)
- [useState](file://react)
- [useEffect](file://react)
- [useCallback](file://react)
- [*](file://three)
- [useFrame](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [useThree](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [useTexture](file://@react-three/drei)
- [Instances](file://@react-three/drei)
- [Instance](file://@react-three/drei)
- [forceSimulation](file://d3-force-3d)
- [forceLink](file://d3-force-3d)
- [forceManyBody](file://d3-force-3d)
- [forceCollide](file://d3-force-3d)
- [forceX](file://d3-force-3d)
- [forceY](file://d3-force-3d)
- [forceZ](file://d3-force-3d)
- [*](file://gsap)
- [Node](file://../types/index.js)
- [Link](file://../types/index.js)
- [Trajectory](file://../types/index.js)
- [GhostTrace](file://../types/index.js)
- [useMatrixStore](file://../store/useMatrixStore.js)
- [ConnectionLayer](file://./ConnectionLayer.tsx)
- [FresnelAura](file://./AuraLayers.tsx)
- [SelectionHighlight](file://./AuraLayers.tsx)
- [TextLabel](file://./TextLabel.tsx)
- [GhostTraceLayer](file://./GhostTraceLayer.tsx)
- [useNeuralData](file://../logic/useNeuralData.ts)
- [STELLAR_MAP](file://../logic/useNeuralData.ts)
- [getStar](file://../logic/useNeuralData.ts)

### Exports
- `NeuralGraph`
- `NeuralGraph`
- `useThree`
- `simReady`
- `useMatrixStore`
- `useNeuralData`
- `odinTexture`
- `alfredTexture`
- `simulation`
- `i`
- `map`
- `protocol`
- `ws`
- `msg`
- `targetNode`
- `handleNodeClick`
- `targetPos`
- `activeNodeId`
